name: Capital Chicken Skillet
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove bones, skin, and all fat from chicken; cut into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat. Brown the chicken on all sides, then drain.
3. Add mushrooms to the skillet and stir in flour.
4. Add soup, wine, water; cook, stirring, about 10 minutes, until sauce thickens.
5. Stir in dry milk, salt, tarragon, and pepper.
6. Drain artichoke hearts.
7. Chop green onions.
8. Mix in artichoke hearts, green onions, and parsley. Heat through and serve over rice.
9. For heartier servings, add frozen green beans or peas after sauce thickens.
